narrative:
Upper Arlington City has 28,874 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
